name: python3-stone
title: python3-stone
summary: interface description language (IDL) for APIs (Python3 version)
description:
interface description language (IDL) for APIs (Python3 version)
The Official API Spec Language for Dropbox. Define an API once in Stone. Use
backends, i.e. code generators, to translate your specification into objects
and functions in the programming languages of your choice.
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.

arguments.description: obj_c_client, obj_c_types, obj_c_tests, js_client, js_types, tsd_client,
arguments.raw: -in  obj_c_client, obj_c_types, obj_c_tests, js_client, js_types, tsd_client,

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use stone-py because interface description language (IDL) for APIs (Python3 version).

When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair stone-py with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `stone-py --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
